context.setting: Working on laptop with laptop on Right

episode_text:
day=1; meal=chicken nuggets, broccoli, and ketchup; setting=Working on laptop with laptop on Right; time_of_day=noon;
preferences: microwave_time=1 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize right occlusion; robot_speed=fast; skewering_axis=perpendicular to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=inside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=not applicable; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=speech; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=autocontinue; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=autocontinue; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=speech; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=perception; retract_between_bites=no; bite_dipping_preference=do not dip; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=10 sec

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context involves working on a device positioned to the user's right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is unspecified/non-dippable THEN minimize right occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to preserve visibility of the laptop on the right.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF the user cannot lean forward due to lack of trunk control THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE outside-mouth transfer is physically incompatible with the user's abilities.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer_mode is inside mouth transfer THEN not applicable BECAUSE this parameter only applies to outside-mouth transfer, which is not compatible with the user's physical abilities.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF physical button use is required THEN do not use button BECAUSE the user has severe upper-limb paralysis and cannot press physical buttons. IF dining context involves working on a laptop on the right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is unspecified/non-dippable THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user explicitly preferred low-effort automatic initiation in that context.

IF physical button use is required THEN do not use button BECAUSE the user has severe upper-limb paralysis and cannot press physical buttons. IF dining context involves working on a laptop on the right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is unspecified/non-dippable THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user explicitly preferred low-effort automatic initiation in that context.

IF physical button use is required THEN do not use button BECAUSE the user has severe upper-limb paralysis and cannot press physical buttons. IF dining context involves working on a laptop on the right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is unspecified/non-dippable THEN autocontinue BECAUSE the user explicitly preferred low-effort automatic initiation in that context.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF physical button use is required THEN do not use button BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons. IF feeding transfer completion can be detected by robot perception THEN perception BECAUSE the user explicitly selected it and it minimizes user effort.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF physical button use is required THEN do not use button BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons. IF drinking transfer completion can be detected by robot perception using head gestures THEN perception BECAUSE the user has good head/neck control and explicitly selected this low-effort option.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF physical button use is required THEN do not use button BECAUSE the user cannot press physical buttons. IF mouth-wiping completion can be detected by robot perception using head gestures THEN perception BECAUSE the user has good head/neck control and explicitly selected this low-effort option.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF dining context involves working on a laptop on the right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is unspecified/non-dippable THEN no BECAUSE the user accepted faster operation without retracting, despite also preferring reduced right-side occlusion.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food includes a dip or sauce such as ketchup AND the user explicitly chooses not to use it in the current context THEN do not dip BECAUSE the observed meal included ketchup and the user still preferred no dipping.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.user_tendencies: IF the user is using autocontinue for transfer initiation in a task-focused context such as working on a laptop AND affective_state is neutral THEN 10 sec BECAUSE the user explicitly preferred a short wait that reduces interaction time.
